title: Malacantha alnifolia
taxonomy: Malacantha alnifolia is classified within the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the mallow family. This family is a part of the order Malvales, which includes various flowering plants. Malacantha alnifolia is native to China and is a shrub or small tree species. Further classification of the plant places it in the subfamily Malvoideae, a subfamily within the family Malvaceae. The Malvaceae family is known for its diverse range of flowering plants.
